violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermo-label (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC to ensure any equipment/utensils are properly sanitized in the 3-bay sink after being washed and rinsed in the dish machine. Call was made for service at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The flow pressure gauge for the fresh hot water sanitizing rinse (PSI) was not between 15-25 PSI as required. Pressure gauge is to be repaired/adjusted for proper high temp. sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen area. PIC to obtain testing device for the high temp dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

At the time of inspection, the high temp dish machine was observed to not be working properly for proper sanitizing of food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermo-label (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Utensils and equipment are to be properly sanitized in the 3 bay sink until dish machine is serviced/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
